meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $PPC 169/180 (rem 11d)
[Earnings in 2W]:
• $AGX  ER in 6d  (2026-03-26)
• $CCL  ER in 7d  (2026-03-27)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $CCL | EVENT+NEWS+DVG | -15.9% | Vol 1.6x | ER in 7d
• $UBER | NEWS+BD200 | -15.6% | Vol 0.7x | Uber expands robotaxi push with Nvidia and Rivian deals
• $B | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -19.3% | Vol 1.8x | Barrick paid its Q4 dividend on March 16
• $NEM | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -15.0% | Vol 1.3x | Gold plunge pressures Newmont shares
• $WLDN | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -21.7% | Vol 0.8x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $SKYW | NEWS+BD200 | -15.2% | Vol 2.8x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $OKTA | NEWS+BD200 | -12.3% | Vol 1.1x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $CRDO | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -20.1% | Vol 0.8x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found

🎯 Triggers: OKTA > 78.95 (EMA21) | UBER > 74.93 (EMA21) | SKYW > 94.56 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Carnival set to report Q1 results on March 27
focus_view_model.news_summary: The company is scheduled to report first-quarter results on March 27, and the market is already repricing the name into the event window.

logic_pillars.technical: Price is clearly below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21, so the structure remains a standard downtrend into a near-term event.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.62 shows participation well above normal and suggests the market is actively positioning ahead of earnings.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The main near-term driver is the March 27 earnings event, while the broader risk-off regime is also unfavorable for consumer discretionary names.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy, but price remains below SMA200 and the setup is still technically broken.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Stay on watch ahead of earnings; if daily closes cannot reclaim EMA21 (26.84), do not add.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Carnival set to report Q1 results on March 27 · 1d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Uber expands robotaxi push with Nvidia and Rivian deals
focus_view_model.news_summary: Uber announced fresh autonomous-driving partnerships over the past week, but the stock has not yet completed a technical repair.

logic_pillars.technical: Price remains below SMA200 and EMA55, but the gap to EMA21 is only -1.4%, so this is an early repair test rather than a confirmed reversal.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.75 shows weak confirmation, meaning the positive news flow has not yet attracted strong tape sponsorship.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The robotaxi partnership developments are material positive catalysts, but they are not yet validated by price structure.

divergence.note: Fresh positive company-specific news conflicts with price still being below SMA200 and EMA55.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Keep it on watch; only a daily close above EMA55 (77.49) would materially improve the repair quality.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Uber expands robotaxi push with Nvidia and Rivian deals · 1d · 2 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Barrick paid its Q4 dividend on March 16
focus_view_model.news_summary: The company completed its dividend payment on March 16, but the stock has not translated that into technical repair.

logic_pillars.technical: Price remains below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21, with a -19.3% SMA200 bias that still reflects heavily damaged structure.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.78 confirms that the move is active and not just a low-volume drift lower.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The dividend event is mildly supportive, but it has not changed the broader weak technical setup.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Strong Buy, but price is still materially below SMA200, creating a clear rating-price divergence.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for a reclaim of EMA21 (44.04); until then, treat this as a divergence watch rather than an add setup.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Barrick paid its Q4 dividend on March 16 · 4d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_summary: A sharp move lower in gold has pressured the miners, with Newmont directly exposed to the negative commodity backdrop.

logic_pillars.technical: Price sits below all major moving averages, and both EMA21 and EMA55 are far above current levels, so the repair hurdle is high.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.29 confirms meaningful participation in the decline and argues against dismissing the move as noise.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The fresh driver is gold-price weakness, which is directly relevant to near-term miner sentiment.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Strong Buy, but the stock remains in a clear downtrend and is facing fresh commodity-related pressure.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Do not consider new entries until price reclaims EMA21 (113.02); stronger repair would require EMA55 (113.13).
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Gold plunge pressures Newmont shares · 1d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No sufficiently high-quality company-specific catalyst was found in the required window, so the case remains primarily technical.

logic_pillars.technical: The SMA200 bias is -21.7%, among the deepest in the set, and price remains below EMA55 and EMA21.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.79 indicates weak sponsorship and no meaningful bottom-fishing confirmation yet.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: No qualifying fresh catalyst was found, so the signal remains dominated by the broken chart.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Buy, but the technical structure is severely damaged and lacks volume-based repair.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Continue to avoid until price can at least reclaim EMA21 (88.06) as an initial repair step.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No sufficiently high-quality company-specific catalyst was found in the required window, so the alert is mainly volume-driven.

logic_pillars.technical: Price remains below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21, so no trend repair is visible yet.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=2.78 is the highest in the group and clearly qualifies as a strong volume alert.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: Without a qualifying fresh catalyst, this is best treated as a pure abnormal-volume watch.

divergence.note: This is primarily a volume anomaly rather than a strong rating-news-price divergence case.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for a reclaim of EMA21 (94.56); otherwise keep treating it as a high-volatility weak-structure setup.
focus_view_model.news_blurb: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found · n/a · 0 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying fresh catalyst was found in the required window, so this remains mainly a technical watch.

logic_pillars.technical: Price is only -0.7% from EMA21, which satisfies the NEAR_EMA21 rule, but it is still below SMA200 and EMA55.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=1.08 is close to normal and does not provide strong directional confirmation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: With no fresh event, this setup is mostly about technical behavior around the short-term average.

divergence.note: There is no strong rating-news-price divergence here; this is a neutral-to-weak monitoring case.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Watch for a daily close above EMA21 (78.95); if that happens, the next reference line is EMA55 (81.90).

focus_view_model.news_headline: No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
focus_view_model.news_summary: No qualifying fresh catalyst was found in the required window, so the case is still driven by technical damage and rating divergence.

logic_pillars.technical: Price is deeply below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21, with a -20.1% SMA200 bias.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20=0.80 shows no clear increase in participation that would confirm a repair attempt.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: With no fresh catalyst, this remains a technical imbalance watch rather than a news-driven setup.

divergence.note: SA Overall is Strong Buy, but the stock remains in a confirmed downtrend, creating a classic divergence case.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Wait for price to reclaim EMA21 (112.62); stronger repair confirmation would require EMA55 (123.01).
